hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Functional phone phrases (+ can/could) -- handle a simple work call -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- On the Phone -- Handling a Work Call
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 13 -- On the Phone

listenings.text: Hi Danilo, this is Rachel. I am calling about the client meeting on Friday. I tried to call you this morning, but I could not reach you. Could you call me back today? You can also send me a short message if you are in a meeting right now. If I do not pick up, please leave a voicemail, and I will call you back. Thank you so much, and talk soon. Bye!

Hi, you have reached Danilo Febba, Data Engineering Lead. I am sorry I cannot take your call right now. I am probably in a meeting or running a data pipeline. Please leave your name, your number, and a short message after the tone. You can also send me an email, and I will get back to you today. Thank you for calling. Have a great day!
